task: Browse the first top news of Microsoft stock on Google Finance.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Google Finance, opened the Microsoft stock page (MSFT), and then clicked the first news item shown under Microsoft’s news section: Quartz’s “LinkedIn layoffs 2026: company cutting 5% of workforce.” The resulting article page was opened and visible, satisfying the instruction to browse the first top news of Microsoft stock on Google Finance.
final_result_response:
Done. I opened Microsoft stock on Google Finance and browsed the first top news story:

**Quartz: “LinkedIn is cutting 5% of its workforce in a reorganization”**

Quick gist: LinkedIn, owned by Microsoft, is reportedly cutting about 5% of its workforce, around 875 positions, as part of a reorganization. The article says the cuts are not attributed to AI automation and notes LinkedIn revenue grew 12% year over year in Microsoft’s latest quarter.
action_history: Opening Google Finance: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/finance/');
Opening Microsoft stock page: await page.locator('e87').click();
Opening first Microsoft news story: await page.locator('e229').click();
